steps.title: Isolate $y$
steps.content: The equation is $$y-62=px.$$ Add $62$ to both sides to undo the subtraction.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $y=px+62$ is correct, which is Choice B. $y=62x+p$ attaches $62$ to $x$ incorrectly, while the multiplication and division alternatives use $62$ incorrectly because the original equation subtracts $62$.
